mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FOODM WHERE bId = #{bId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FOODM(foodMaterialName, foodCategory_Id, foodMaterialCount, foodMaterialCountAll, foodMaterialPrice, foodMaterialType, vender, incomeDate, expirationDate, bId) VALUES(#{foodMaterialName}, #{foodCategory}, #{foodMaterialCount}, #{foodMaterialCountAll}, #{foodMaterialPrice}, #{foodMaterialType}, #{vender}, #{incomeDate}, #{expirationDate}, #{bId})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FOODC WHERE foodCategory = #{foodCategory}

SELECT f.foodMaterial_Id AS foodMaterialId, f.foodMaterialName, c.foodCategory, f.vender, f.foodMaterialType FROM FOODM f JOIN FOODC c ON f.foodCategory_Id = c.foodCategory_Id WHERE f.foodMaterialName LIKE CONCAT('%', #{foodMaterialName}, '%') AND f.bId = #{bId}

SELECT f.foodMaterial_Id AS foodMaterialId, f.foodMaterialName, c.foodCategory, f.foodMaterialCount, f.foodMaterialCountAll, f.foodMaterialPrice, f.foodMaterialType, f.vender, f.incomeDate, f.expirationDate, f.bId FROM FOODM f JOIN FOODC c ON f.foodCategory_Id = c.foodCategory_Id WHERE f.foodMaterial_Id = #{foodMaterialId}
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(foodMaterialPrice), 0) FROM FOODM WHERE bId = #{bId} AND incomeDate >= STR_TO_DATE(#{startDate}, '%Y-%m-%d') AND incomeDate < STR_TO_DATE(#{endDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')

SELECT RANK() OVER (ORDER BY foodMaterialPrice * foodMaterialCount DESC) AS ranking, foodMaterial_Id AS foodMaterialId, foodMaterialName, foodMaterialPrice, foodMaterialCount, foodMaterialPrice * foodMaterialCount AS totalExpense, incomeDate, bId FROM FOODM WHERE bId = #{bId} AND incomeDate >= STR_TO_DATE(#{startDate}, '%Y-%m-%d') AND incomeDate < STR_TO_DATE(#{endDate}, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY totalExpense DESC
SELECT foodCategory_Id AS foodCategoryId, foodCategory FROM FOODC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FOODM f JOIN FOODC c ON f.foodCategory_Id = c.foodCategory_Id WHERE c.foodCategory = #{foodCategory}
SELECT f.foodMaterial_Id AS foodMaterialId, f.foodMaterialName, c.foodCategory FROM FOODM f JOIN FOODC c ON f.foodCategory_Id = c.foodCategory_Id WHERE f.bId = #{bId} ORDER BY f.foodMaterialName ASC
SELECT foodCategory_Id FROM FOODC WHERE foodCategory = #{foodCategory}
